variants.modifierDescription: The tileset has a fire hazard. Warframe health is halved. Meltdown Iminent.
Maximum Warframe Energy capacity is quartered. Energy Siphon is less effective.
Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.

activeChallenges.desc: Polarize a Weapon, Companion, or Warframe (not in Simulacrum).
activeChallenges.title: Polarized

activeChallenges.desc: Defeat the Orowyrm in Steel Path
activeChallenges.title: Elite Beast Slayer

activeChallenges.desc: Complete 8 Zones of Elite Sanctuary Onslaught
activeChallenges.title: Elite Test Subject
